GetExecutionListV2.state: Execution state; if set, only returns executions with the specified state. Valid values: RUNNING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CANCELED, PENDING
GetExecutionListV2.cronExecutionName: Scheduled O&M name; if set, only returns executions triggered by the specified scheduled O&M
GetExecutionListV2.eventExecutionName: Alert event O&M name; if set, only returns executions triggered by the specified alert event O&M
GetExecutionListV2.startTime: Execution start time in milliseconds; default is the timestamp 7 days ago
GetExecutionListV2.endTime: Execution end time in milliseconds; default is the current timestamp
GetExecutionListV2.sort: Sort field, default is execution start time. Valid values: startTime, endTime
GetExecutionListV2.ascending: Whether to sort in ascending order, default false
GetExecutionListV2.pageSize: Number of items per page, maximum 100
